query_normalized: systematic review of privacy-preserving federated learning protocols computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it presents a specific protocol for privacy-preserving federated learning (applied to genomic GWAS) using homomorphic encryption and secure hardware, which is a direct instance of the "Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Protocols" the user is reviewing. It provides a concrete example of the mechanisms and domain applications relevant to the systematic review.
